chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 813 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.4317/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2025 Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Fahad Hussain Arijo, advocate for the respondent/SRB. Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Amiruddin, Assistant Commissioner, Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi. Per learned counsel for the petitioner, pursuant to issuance of notice in this petition a certified copy of the impugned order has been provided by the Sindh Revenue Board to the petitioner and immediately thereupon appeal has been preferred. He seeks that during pendency thereof no enforcement of any demand pertinent thereto may be enforced there against. Mr. Amiruddin, Assistant Commissioner articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
